Hide and Seek (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,100,486Details
International Box Office $72,596,255
Worldwide Box Office $123,696,741
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,959,233 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,005 opening theaters/3,005 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,345,060

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 28th, 2005 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 11th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: July 5th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for frightening sequences and violence
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Faked Suicide, Infidelity, Mental Illness, Multiple Personality, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
